wizard.title: Manboster Configuration Wizard
wizard.welcome: Welcome to the Manboster Configuration Wizard. Enjoy your experience with your little Manbo!
wizard.success: Setup complete! Wish you have a good time with your Manbo Lobster!
wizard.error_retry: An error occurred while processing the wizard: %v
wizard.entrypoint.select_help: Welcome to Manboster Configuration Wizard! Please choose the field you want to configure.
wizard.entrypoint.database:
Database
Manage chats, users and sessions. Purge unused sessions, manage users, and more.
wizard.entrypoint.config:
Configuration
Manage model and chat provider settings. Modify models, default models, or application settings.
wizard.entrypoint.editor:
Open config.yaml in system default editor
(For advanced users only)
wizard.config_landing.select_help: Please choose what you want to configure.
wizard.config_landing.chat:
Chat Providers
Add, edit or delete your chat providers.
wizard.config_landing.llm:
LLM Providers
Add, edit or delete your LLM providers.
wizard.config_landing.tool:
Tool Providers
Add, edit or delete your tool providers.
wizard.config_landing.hachimi:
Hachimi Settings
Add, edit or delete your Hachimi providers or modify Hachimi settings.
wizard.action.what_to_do: What do you want to do with it?
wizard.onboard.existing_config:
**A valid configuration file is found on your machine!**

wizard.onboard.app_select_help: The provider you select will be the default for all sessions. If you are unsure, leave it as is.
wizard.onboard.hachimi_feature_prompt:
Hachimi is a small language model that runs on your device and evaluates LLM behavior.
It stays inactive to save memory until called.

Disable it if your device has less than 1GB of free memory or if you are unsure.

To enable Hachimi, ensure you have an Internet connection and 2GB of free disk space.

wizard.onboard.tool_select_prompt: Select and activate the tools you want to use:

wizard.onboard.preview_continue: If there are no issues, you can proceed to save the configuration.

wizard.onboard.warning_risk_title:
# RISK DISCLOSURE & DISCLAIMER
**PLEASE READ THESE WORDS CAREFULLY:**

Manboster is an AI agent able to chat and control your computers like OpenClaw and IronClaw and currently in MVP stage. By proceeding, you acknowledge:
1. WIP means this project is **Work in Progress**, and **it is expected to encounter bugs, crashes, and breaking changes.**
2. If you run 'manboster start', you open a daemon running in your computer. **The background process has persistent resource access to your computer.**
3. WASM sandboxing plugins is strong, but **3rd-party code still carries risks**.
4. **Hachimi scoring reduces decision fatigue, but cannot fully prevent advanced prompt injections or unsafe LLM behaviors.**
5. **Granting access enables data transmission to LLMs and allows device control. We are not liable for any issues arising from these interactions.**
6. This software is provided "AS IS" under Apache 2.0. **You are strictly prohibited from using this application for any criminal or illegal purposes. We disclaim all liability and responsibility for any unlawful activities conducted using this software.**
wizard.onboard.warning_risk_prompt:
Please scroll up and read RISK DISCLOSURE & DISCLAIMER carefully.
Do you understand the risks and wish to proceed?
wizard.onboard.warning_unstable_title:
# UNSTABLE VERSION WARNING
**PLEASE READ THESE WORDS CAREFULLY:**
It seems that you're going to use an unstable version of Manboster. Please note that:
1. It's normal to encounter bugs, crashes, and breaking changes in unstable versions.
2. As this is not a stable version, it does not contain ANY security patches and fixes.
3. This version's configuration may be incompatible with older versions — please be aware of configuration changes.
4. If you encounter bugs, we appreciate you submitting issues and we will fix them as soon as possible.
5. PLEASE DO NOT STORE ANY SENSITIVE AND IMPORTANT DATA IN THIS VERSION! As it's unstable and we are unsure that this application will work as expected.
wizard.onboard.warning_unstable_prompt:
Please scroll up and read UNSTABLE VERSION WARNING carefully.
Do you understand the risks and wish to proceed?
